_comment: dialogue_thandensreach.json: This table is used for the npc chat in Thanden's reach.
name: Kaelith Nightshade
description: Mixed town leader affiliated with local guilds in Thanden’s Reach.

dialogue.greeting: Greetings, traveler. I am Kaelith Nightshade, the town leader here.
dialogue.role: My duties as a town leader keep me quite busy.
dialogue.background: I've been in Thanden's Reach for many years, serving as a town leader.
dialogue.rumors: There are whispers of strange happenings beyond the town borders.
dialogue.farewell: Safe travels, and may fortune favor you.
